name: [auto_patrol] 機台5 in 2 out check
description: 查詢機台最近5次的process, 結果以table 呈現, 並檢查最近5次的process 是否有2次以上的OOC
steps_mapping: [{"step_id": "step1", "nl_segment": "stub: 取最近 5 次 process", "python_code": "result = await execute_mcp(\"get_process_info\", {\"toolID\": equipment_id, \"limit\": 5})\nevents = result.get(\"events\", []) if isinstance(result, dict) else []\n_findings = {\"condition_met\": False, \"summary\": \"stub patrol\", \"outputs\": {\"event_count\": len(events)}}"}]
